queries.question: List all the projects in Los Angeles and their dates, budget and staff
queries.sql: SELECT Budget, Staff, StartDate, EndDate  FROM Construction_Projects WHERE Location = 'Los Angeles';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?budget ?staff ?startdate ?enddate WHERE {
  ?construction_projects a :Construction_Projects .
  ?construction_projects p:budget ?budget .
  ?construction_projects p:Staff ?staff .
  ?construction_projects p:StartDate ?startdate .
  ?construction_projects p:EndDate ?enddate .
  ?construction_projects p:location ?location_f .
  FILTER(?location_f = "Los Angeles")
}

queries.question: List the location, budget and staff required for each project, sorted by start date.
queries.sql: SELECT Budget, Staff, Location FROM Construction_Projects ORDER BY StartDate DESC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/construction/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?budget ?staff ?location WHERE {
  ?construction_projects a :Construction_Projects .
  ?construction_projects p:budget ?budget .
  ?construction_projects p:Staff ?staff .
  ?construction_projects p:location ?location .
  ?construction_projects p:StartDate ?startdate_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?startdate_o)
